# audiomcp.ai

> audiomcp.ai is MCP-native agentic voice infrastructure for AI agents.

## Primary Pages

- [Homepage](https://audiomcp.ai/)
- [Contact](https://audiomcp.ai/contact)
- [Privacy Policy](https://audiomcp.ai/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://audiomcp.ai/terms)

## Summary

audiomcp.ai exposes voice-agent creation as Model Context Protocol tools so AI agents can provision, configure, deploy, and observe voice agents without a human assembling telephony, speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and turn-taking infrastructure by hand.
